#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import os
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Set, Tuple

import pandas as pd

try:
    import networkx as nx
except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
    raise SystemExit("依赖检查失败：需要 networkx。请先安装：pip install networkx") from e

DEFAULT_WINDOWS_RESULT_DIR = r"D:\其他-小论文\数据库\zonode\陆宏龙\2\优化方案2\结果"
DEFAULT_WSL_RESULT_DIR = "/mnt/d/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/结果"

REQUIRED_INPUTS = [
    "ITS1_spieceasi_edges.tsv",
    "ITS2_spieceasi_edges.tsv",
    "ITS1_flashweave_edges.tsv",
    "ITS2_flashweave_edges.tsv",
    "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS1.tsv",
    "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS2.tsv",
    "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS1.tsv",
    "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS2.tsv",
    "sample_type_call.tsv",
    "cross_marker_support_summary.tsv",
    "replicate_support_summary.tsv",
    "moduleA_prep/network_taxa_intersection.tsv",
]

OUTPUT_FILES = [
    "reproducible_edges.tsv",
    "marker_specific_edges.tsv",
    "reproducible_core_modules.tsv",
    "node_centrality_comparison.tsv",
    "edge_stability_summary.tsv",
    "topology_stability_summary.tsv",
    "dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment.tsv",
    "network_metric_definitions.tsv",
    "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv",
    "cross_marker_support_network_addon.tsv",
    "sample_level_error_log.tsv",
]

RANK_PREFIX = {
    "genus": "g__",
    "family": "f__",
    "order": "o__",
    "class": "c__",
    "phylum": "p__",
}
UNRESOLVED_TOKENS = {"", "unassigned", "unresolved", "unknown", "na", "none", "nan"}

def die(msg: str) -> None:
    raise SystemExit(f"[STEP5A_FINAL_FATAL] {msg}")

def info(msg: str) -> None:
    print(f"[STEP5A_FINAL] {msg}")

def warn(msg: str) -> None:
    print(f"[STEP5A_FINAL_WARN] {msg}")

def normalize_path_for_runtime(path_value: str) -> Path:
    raw = str(path_value).strip()
    if os.name == "nt":
        return Path(raw)
    raw_norm = raw.replace("\\", "/")
    if len(raw_norm) >= 3 and raw_norm[1:3] == ":/":
        drv = raw_norm[0].lower()
        tail = raw_norm[3:]
        return Path(f"/mnt/{drv}/{tail}")
    return Path(raw_norm)

def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Module A - final network addon")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--result-dir",
        default=DEFAULT_WINDOWS_RESULT_DIR if os.name == "nt" else DEFAULT_WSL_RESULT_DIR,
        help="结果目录（Windows 或 WSL 路径均可）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--overwrite",
        action=argparse.BooleanOptionalAction,
        default=True,
        help="是否覆盖已有输出",
    )
    return parser.parse_args()

def load_tsv(path: Path, label: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    try:
        return pd.read_csv(path, sep="\t", dtype=str, encoding="utf-8")
    except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
        die(f"读取 {label} 失败: {path} -> {e}")

def write_tsv(df: pd.DataFrame, path: Path) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    df.to_csv(path, sep="\t", index=False, encoding="utf-8")

def first_existing_col(df: pd.DataFrame, candidates: List[str]) -> Optional[str]:
    for c in candidates:
        if c in df.columns:
            return c
    return None

def require_col(df: pd.DataFrame, candidates: List[str], label: str) -> str:
    c = first_existing_col(df, candidates)
    if c is None:
        die(f"{label} 缺少关键列。候选列={candidates}；当前列={list(df.columns)}")
    return c

def clean_text(x: object) -> str:
    s = str(x).strip()
    if s.lower() == "nan":
        return ""
    return s

def normalize_spaces_and_underscores(x: object) -> str:
    s = clean_text(x).replace("_", " ")
    s = " ".join(s.split())
    return s

def normalize_rank(x: object) -> str:
    return normalize_spaces_and_underscores(x).lower()

def prefix_taxon(rank: str, bare_name: str) -> str:
    return f"{RANK_PREFIX[rank]}{bare_name}"

def extract_genus_from_species_name(name: str) -> str:
    norm = normalize_spaces_and_underscores(name)
    if not norm:
        return ""
    parts = norm.split(" ")
    return parts[0].strip() if parts else ""

def harmonize_rank_name(rank: str, name: str) -> str:
    rank = normalize_rank(rank)
    name = clean_text(name)
    name_norm = normalize_spaces_and_underscores(name).lower()

    if rank in UNRESOLVED_TOKENS or name_norm in UNRESOLVED_TOKENS:
        return ""

    if rank == "species":
        genus = extract_genus_from_species_name(name)
        return prefix_taxon("genus", genus) if genus else ""

    if rank == "genus":
        genus = normalize_spaces_and_underscores(name)
        return prefix_taxon("genus", genus) if genus else ""

    if rank in {"family", "order", "class", "phylum"}:
        bare = normalize_spaces_and_underscores(name)
        return prefix_taxon(rank, bare) if bare else ""

    return ""

def check_inputs(result_dir: Path) -> None:
    missing = []
    for rel in REQUIRED_INPUTS:
        p = result_dir / rel
        if not p.exists():
            missing.append(str(p))
    if missing:
        die("缺少输入文件:\n- " + "\n- ".join(missing))

def standardize_edge_table(df: pd.DataFrame, marker: str, method: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    need = {
        "node1": require_col(df, ["node1"], f"{marker}_{method}.node1"),
        "node2": require_col(df, ["node2"], f"{marker}_{method}.node2"),
        "sign": require_col(df, ["sign"], f"{marker}_{method}.sign"),
        "threshold_level": require_col(df, ["threshold_level"], f"{marker}_{method}.threshold_level"),
        "resample_id": require_col(df, ["resample_id"], f"{marker}_{method}.resample_id"),
    }
    weight_col = first_existing_col(df, ["weight"])

    x = df.rename(columns={
        need["node1"]: "node1",
        need["node2"]: "node2",
        need["sign"]: "sign",
        need["threshold_level"]: "threshold_level",
        need["resample_id"]: "resample_id",
    }).copy()

    x["marker"] = marker
    x["method"] = method
    x["node1"] = x["node1"].astype(str).map(clean_text)
    x["node2"] = x["node2"].astype(str).map(clean_text)
    x["sign"] = x["sign"].astype(str).map(clean_text)
    x["threshold_level"] = x["threshold_level"].astype(str).map(clean_text).str.lower()
    x["resample_id"] = pd.to_numeric(x["resample_id"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
    x["weight"] = pd.to_numeric(df[weight_col], errors="coerce") if weight_col else pd.NA

    swap_idx = x["node1"] > x["node2"]
    tmp = x.loc[swap_idx, "node1"].copy()
    x.loc[swap_idx, "node1"] = x.loc[swap_idx, "node2"].values
    x.loc[swap_idx, "node2"] = tmp.values

    x["edge_key"] = x["node1"] + "||" + x["node2"]

    x = x[
        (x["node1"] != "") &
        (x["node2"] != "") &
        (x["node1"] != x["node2"]) &
        (x["threshold_level"].isin(["loose", "default", "strict"]))
    ].copy()

    x = x.drop_duplicates(subset=["marker", "method", "threshold_level", "resample_id", "edge_key", "sign"])
    return x[["marker", "method", "node1", "node2", "edge_key", "sign", "weight", "threshold_level", "resample_id"]]

def summarize_edge_stats(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    对每个 marker / method / threshold / edge_key 汇总：
    - 主运行是否存在（resample_id=0）
    - 主运行 sign / weight
    - bootstrap 出现比例（1..B）
    """
    cols = [
        "marker", "method", "threshold_level", "edge_key", "node1", "node2",
        "main_present", "main_sign", "main_weight",
        "bootstrap_n", "bootstrap_support_n", "edge_stability_score"
    ]
    if df.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=cols)

    rows = []
    group_cols = ["marker", "method", "threshold_level", "edge_key"]
    for keys, g in df.groupby(group_cols, dropna=False):
        marker, method, level, edge_key = keys
        node1 = g["node1"].iloc[0]
        node2 = g["node2"].iloc[0]

        g_main = g[g["resample_id"] == 0]
        main_present = not g_main.empty
        main_sign = g_main["sign"].iloc[0] if main_present else ""
        main_weight = g_main["weight"].iloc[0] if main_present else pd.NA

        g_boot = g[g["resample_id"] > 0]
        bootstrap_ids = sorted(set(g_boot["resample_id"].tolist()))
        bootstrap_n = len(bootstrap_ids)
        bootstrap_support_n = len(bootstrap_ids)
        edge_stability_score = (bootstrap_support_n / bootstrap_n) if bootstrap_n > 0 else pd.NA

        rows.append({
            "marker": marker,
            "method": method,
            "threshold_level": level,
            "edge_key": edge_key,
            "node1": node1,
            "node2": node2,
            "main_present": bool(main_present),
            "main_sign": main_sign,
            "main_weight": main_weight,
            "bootstrap_n": int(bootstrap_n),
            "bootstrap_support_n": int(bootstrap_support_n),
            "edge_stability_score": edge_stability_score,
        })

    return pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=cols)

def load_common_taxa_sets(common_df: pd.DataFrame) -> Dict[str, Set[str]]:
    need_level = require_col(common_df, ["threshold_level"], "network_taxa_intersection.threshold_level")
    need_taxon = require_col(common_df, ["harmonized_taxon_name"], "network_taxa_intersection.harmonized_taxon_name")
    need_flag = require_col(common_df, ["common_taxa_flag"], "network_taxa_intersection.common_taxa_flag")

    x = common_df.rename(columns={
        need_level: "threshold_level",
        need_taxon: "harmonized_taxon_name",
        need_flag: "common_taxa_flag",
    }).copy()

    x["threshold_level"] = x["threshold_level"].astype(str).map(clean_text).str.lower()
    x["harmonized_taxon_name"] = x["harmonized_taxon_name"].astype(str).map(clean_text)
    x["common_taxa_flag"] = x["common_taxa_flag"].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower().isin({"1", "true", "t", "yes", "y"})

    out = {}
    for level in ["loose", "default", "strict"]:
        out[level] = set(
            x.loc[
                (x["threshold_level"] == level) & (x["common_taxa_flag"] == True),
                "harmonized_taxon_name"
            ].tolist()
        )
    return out

def get_edge_row(stats_df: pd.DataFrame, marker: str, method: str, level: str, edge_key: str) -> Optional[pd.Series]:
    sub = stats_df[
        (stats_df["marker"] == marker) &
        (stats_df["method"] == method) &
        (stats_df["threshold_level"] == level) &
        (stats_df["edge_key"] == edge_key)
    ]
    if sub.empty:
        return None
    return sub.iloc[0]

def evaluate_loose_edges(sp_stats: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    cols = [
        "edge_key",
        "reproducible_edge_loose",
        "loose_sign_agree",
        "loose_edge_stability_score",
        "loose_threshold_level",
        "loose_rule_note",
    ]

    if sp_stats.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=cols)

    its1_loose = set(
        sp_stats.loc[
            (sp_stats["marker"] == "ITS1") &
            (sp_stats["threshold_level"] == "loose") &
            (sp_stats["main_present"] == True),
            "edge_key"
        ].tolist()
    )
    its2_loose = set(
        sp_stats.loc[
            (sp_stats["marker"] == "ITS2") &
            (sp_stats["threshold_level"] == "loose") &
            (sp_stats["main_present"] == True),
            "edge_key"
        ].tolist()
    )
    common = sorted(its1_loose.intersection(its2_loose))

    rows = []
    for edge_key in common:
        r1 = get_edge_row(sp_stats, "ITS1", "SPIEC_EASI", "loose", edge_key)
        r2 = get_edge_row(sp_stats, "ITS2", "SPIEC_EASI", "loose", edge_key)
        sign_agree = (r1 is not None and r2 is not None and r1["main_sign"] == r2["main_sign"])

        s1 = pd.to_numeric(pd.Series([r1["edge_stability_score"]]), errors="coerce").iloc[0] if r1 is not None else pd.NA
        s2 = pd.to_numeric(pd.Series([r2["edge_stability_score"]]), errors="coerce").iloc[0] if r2 is not None else pd.NA
        vals = [v for v in [s1, s2] if pd.notna(v)]
        loose_stability = min(vals) if vals else pd.NA
        loose_pass = bool(sign_agree and pd.notna(loose_stability) and float(loose_stability) >= 0.70)

        rows.append({
            "edge_key": edge_key,
            "reproducible_edge_loose": loose_pass,
            "loose_sign_agree": sign_agree,
            "loose_edge_stability_score": loose_stability,
            "loose_threshold_level": "loose",
            "loose_rule_note": "ITS1/ITS2 SPIEC-EASI loose main edge + sign agree + min stability >= 0.70",
        })

    return pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=cols)

def evaluate_strict_edges(sp_stats: pd.DataFrame, fw_stats: pd.DataFrame, common_taxa_sets: Dict[str, Set[str]]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    cols = [
        "edge_key",
        "reproducible_edge_strict",
        "strict_default_pass",
        "strict_strict_pass",
        "strict_default_edge_stability_score",
        "strict_strict_edge_stability_score",
        "strict_rule_note",
    ]

    if sp_stats.empty and fw_stats.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=cols)

    all_keys = sorted(set(sp_stats.get("edge_key", pd.Series(dtype=str)).tolist()) | set(fw_stats.get("edge_key", pd.Series(dtype=str)).tolist()))
    rows = []

    for edge_key in all_keys:
        a, b = edge_key.split("||", 1)

        level_pass = {}
        level_min_stability = {}

        for level in ["default", "strict"]:
            sp1 = get_edge_row(sp_stats, "ITS1", "SPIEC_EASI", level, edge_key)
            sp2 = get_edge_row(sp_stats, "ITS2", "SPIEC_EASI", level, edge_key)
            fw1 = get_edge_row(fw_stats, "ITS1", "FLASHWEAVE", level, edge_key)
            fw2 = get_edge_row(fw_stats, "ITS2", "FLASHWEAVE", level, edge_key)

            sp_present = (sp1 is not None and bool(sp1["main_present"])) and (sp2 is not None and bool(sp2["main_present"]))
            sp_sign_agree = bool(sp_present and sp1["main_sign"] == sp2["main_sign"])

            fw_present = (fw1 is not None and bool(fw1["main_present"])) and (fw2 is not None and bool(fw2["main_present"]))
            fw_sign_agree = bool(fw_present and fw1["main_sign"] == fw2["main_sign"])

            node_constraint = (a in common_taxa_sets.get(level, set())) and (b in common_taxa_sets.get(level, set()))

            vals = []
            for r in [sp1, sp2, fw1, fw2]:
                if r is None:
                    continue
                v = pd.to_numeric(pd.Series([r["edge_stability_score"]]), errors="coerce").iloc[0]
                if pd.notna(v):
                    vals.append(float(v))
            min_stability = min(vals) if vals else pd.NA

            level_pass[level] = bool(
                sp_present and sp_sign_agree and
                fw_present and fw_sign_agree and
                node_constraint and
                pd.notna(min_stability) and float(min_stability) >= 0.70
            )
            level_min_stability[level] = min_stability

        rows.append({
            "edge_key": edge_key,
            "reproducible_edge_strict": bool(level_pass["default"] and level_pass["strict"]),
            "strict_default_pass": bool(level_pass["default"]),
            "strict_strict_pass": bool(level_pass["strict"]),
            "strict_default_edge_stability_score": level_min_stability["default"],
            "strict_strict_edge_stability_score": level_min_stability["strict"],
            "strict_rule_note": "default + strict both pass; cross-marker SPIEC-EASI + FlashWeave sign agreement + common taxa node constraint + min stability >= 0.70",
        })

    return pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=cols)

def build_reproducible_edges(loose_df: pd.DataFrame, strict_df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    loose_cols = [
        "edge_key",
        "reproducible_edge_loose",
        "loose_sign_agree",
        "loose_edge_stability_score",
        "loose_threshold_level",
        "loose_rule_note",
    ]
    strict_cols = [
        "edge_key",
        "reproducible_edge_strict",
        "strict_default_pass",
        "strict_strict_pass",
        "strict_default_edge_stability_score",
        "strict_strict_edge_stability_score",
        "strict_rule_note",
    ]

    if loose_df is None or loose_df.empty:
        loose_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=loose_cols)
    if strict_df is None or strict_df.empty:
        strict_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=strict_cols)

    if "edge_key" not in loose_df.columns:
        loose_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=loose_cols)
    if "edge_key" not in strict_df.columns:
        strict_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=strict_cols)

    keys = sorted(set(loose_df["edge_key"].tolist()) | set(strict_df["edge_key"].tolist()))
    rows = []

    for edge_key in keys:
        l = loose_df[loose_df["edge_key"] == edge_key]
        s = strict_df[strict_df["edge_key"] == edge_key]

        rows.append({
            "edge_key": edge_key,
            "reproducible_edge_loose": bool(l["reproducible_edge_loose"].iloc[0]) if not l.empty else False,
            "reproducible_edge_strict": bool(s["reproducible_edge_strict"].iloc[0]) if not s.empty else False,
            "loose_edge_stability_score": l["loose_edge_stability_score"].iloc[0] if not l.empty else pd.NA,
            "strict_default_edge_stability_score": s["strict_default_edge_stability_score"].iloc[0] if not s.empty else pd.NA,
            "strict_strict_edge_stability_score": s["strict_strict_edge_stability_score"].iloc[0] if not s.empty else pd.NA,
            "strict_default_pass": bool(s["strict_default_pass"].iloc[0]) if not s.empty else False,
            "strict_strict_pass": bool(s["strict_strict_pass"].iloc[0]) if not s.empty else False,
        })

    return pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=[
        "edge_key",
        "reproducible_edge_loose",
        "reproducible_edge_strict",
        "loose_edge_stability_score",
        "strict_default_edge_stability_score",
        "strict_strict_edge_stability_score",
        "strict_default_pass",
        "strict_strict_pass",
    ])

def build_marker_specific_edges(sp_stats: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    更严格一致版：
    - loose/default/strict 三档都输出 marker-specific edge
    - 规则：
      1) 仅 ITS1 主运行存在 -> ITS1_only
      2) 仅 ITS2 主运行存在 -> ITS2_only
      3) 两者都存在但 sign 冲突 -> both_sign_conflict
    """
    rows = []

    for level in ["loose", "default", "strict"]:
        s1 = sp_stats[
            (sp_stats["marker"] == "ITS1") &
            (sp_stats["method"] == "SPIEC_EASI") &
            (sp_stats["threshold_level"] == level) &
            (sp_stats["main_present"] == True)
        ].copy()

        s2 = sp_stats[
            (sp_stats["marker"] == "ITS2") &
            (sp_stats["method"] == "SPIEC_EASI") &
            (sp_stats["threshold_level"] == level) &
            (sp_stats["main_present"] == True)
        ].copy()

        set1 = set(s1["edge_key"].tolist())
        set2 = set(s2["edge_key"].tolist())

        for edge_key in sorted(set1 - set2):
            r = s1[s1["edge_key"] == edge_key].iloc[0]
            rows.append({
                "edge_key": edge_key,
                "node1": r["node1"],
                "node2": r["node2"],
                "marker_specific_edge_flag": True,
                "marker_source": "ITS1_only",
                "edge_stability_score": r["edge_stability_score"],
                "threshold_level": level,
                "burden_use_flag": (level == "default"),
            })

        for edge_key in sorted(set2 - set1):
            r = s2[s2["edge_key"] == edge_key].iloc[0]
            rows.append({
                "edge_key": edge_key,
                "node1": r["node1"],
                "node2": r["node2"],
                "marker_specific_edge_flag": True,
                "marker_source": "ITS2_only",
                "edge_stability_score": r["edge_stability_score"],
                "threshold_level": level,
                "burden_use_flag": (level == "default"),
            })

        for edge_key in sorted(set1.intersection(set2)):
            r1 = s1[s1["edge_key"] == edge_key].iloc[0]
            r2 = s2[s2["edge_key"] == edge_key].iloc[0]
            if r1["main_sign"] != r2["main_sign"]:
                vals = []
                for v in [r1["edge_stability_score"], r2["edge_stability_score"]]:
                    x = pd.to_numeric(pd.Series([v]), errors="coerce").iloc[0]
                    if pd.notna(x):
                        vals.append(float(x))
                rows.append({
                    "edge_key": edge_key,
                    "node1": r1["node1"],
                    "node2": r1["node2"],
                    "marker_specific_edge_flag": True,
                    "marker_source": "both_sign_conflict",
                    "edge_stability_score": min(vals) if vals else pd.NA,
                    "threshold_level": level,
                    "burden_use_flag": (level == "default"),
                })

    return pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=[
        "edge_key",
        "node1",
        "node2",
        "marker_specific_edge_flag",
        "marker_source",
        "edge_stability_score",
        "threshold_level",
        "burden_use_flag",
    ])

def detect_core_modules(repro_df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    更严格一致版：
    - 优先用 strict reproducible edges
    - 若 strict 为空，再回退到 loose
    """
    use = repro_df[repro_df["reproducible_edge_strict"] == True].copy()
    rule_used = "strict"

    if use.empty:
        use = repro_df[repro_df["reproducible_edge_loose"] == True].copy()
        rule_used = "loose_fallback"

    if use.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["module_id", "node_n", "edge_n", "taxa", "rule_used"])

    G = nx.Graph()
    for edge_key in use["edge_key"]:
        a, b = edge_key.split("||", 1)
        G.add_edge(a, b)

    rows = []
    for i, comp in enumerate(nx.connected_components(G), start=1):
        sub = G.subgraph(comp)
        rows.append({
            "module_id": f"M{i}",
            "node_n": int(sub.number_of_nodes()),
            "edge_n": int(sub.number_of_edges()),
            "taxa": "|".join(sorted(comp)),
            "rule_used": rule_used,
        })
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

def compute_node_centrality(sp_stats: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    def build_graph(marker: str) -> nx.Graph:
        use = sp_stats[
            (sp_stats["marker"] == marker) &
            (sp_stats["method"] == "SPIEC_EASI") &
            (sp_stats["threshold_level"] == "default") &
            (sp_stats["main_present"] == True)
        ].copy()
        G = nx.Graph()
        for _, r in use.iterrows():
            G.add_edge(r["node1"], r["node2"])
        return G

    g1 = build_graph("ITS1")
    g2 = build_graph("ITS2")

    c1 = nx.betweenness_centrality(g1) if g1.number_of_nodes() > 0 else {}
    c2 = nx.betweenness_centrality(g2) if g2.number_of_nodes() > 0 else {}

    nodes = sorted(set(c1.keys()) | set(c2.keys()))
    return pd.DataFrame({
        "taxon_name": nodes,
        "ITS1_centrality": [c1.get(n, pd.NA) for n in nodes],
        "ITS2_centrality": [c2.get(n, pd.NA) for n in nodes],
        "delta_centrality": [
            (c1.get(n, 0) - c2.get(n, 0)) if (n in c1 or n in c2) else pd.NA
            for n in nodes
        ],
        "centrality_metric": "betweenness",
    })

def standardize_lineage_table(df: pd.DataFrame, label: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    sample_col = require_col(df, ["sample_id"], f"{label}.sample_id")
    rank_col = require_col(df, ["taxon_rank", "rank"], f"{label}.taxon_rank")
    name_col = require_col(df, ["taxon_name", "lineage_name", "taxon"], f"{label}.taxon_name")
    support_col = first_existing_col(df, ["replicate_support_status", "support_status"])

    x = df.rename(columns={
        sample_col: "sample_id",
        rank_col: "taxon_rank",
        name_col: "taxon_name",
    }).copy()

    x["sample_id"] = x["sample_id"].astype(str).map(clean_text)
    x["taxon_rank"] = x["taxon_rank"].astype(str).map(clean_text)
    x["taxon_name"] = x["taxon_name"].astype(str).map(clean_text)
    x["harmonized_taxon_name"] = x.apply(
        lambda r: harmonize_rank_name(r["taxon_rank"], r["taxon_name"]), axis=1
    )
    x["support_status"] = df[support_col].astype(str).map(clean_text) if support_col else ""
    return x

def extract_cross_supported_taxa(cross_marker_support: pd.DataFrame) -> Dict[str, Set[str]]:
    """
    尝试从 cross_marker_support_summary.tsv 中恢复 taxon 级 cross-secondary supported 节点。
    如果表里没有 taxon 级列，则返回空集合，不报错。
    """
    sample_col = first_existing_col(cross_marker_support, ["sample_id"])
    rank_col = first_existing_col(cross_marker_support, ["taxon_rank", "rank"])
    name_col = first_existing_col(cross_marker_support, ["taxon_name", "lineage_name", "taxon"])
    status_col = first_existing_col(cross_marker_support, [
        "cross_support_status",
        "support_status",
        "support_class",
        "cross_marker_support_status",
        "secondary_support_class",
        "note",
        "reason_code",
    ])

    out: Dict[str, Set[str]] = {}

    if not sample_col or not rank_col or not name_col:
        warn("cross_marker_support_summary.tsv 未检测到 taxon 级列，无法显式恢复 cross-secondary supported taxa；本次保守跳过。")
        return out

    for _, r in cross_marker_support.iterrows():
        sid = clean_text(r[sample_col])
        rank = clean_text(r[rank_col])
        name = clean_text(r[name_col])
        node = harmonize_rank_name(rank, name)
        if not sid or not node:
            continue

        status_text = clean_text(r[status_col]).lower() if status_col else ""
        is_cross_supported = (
            "cross" in status_text or
            "supported" in status_text or
            "stable" in status_text
        )

        if is_cross_supported:
            out.setdefault(sid, set()).add(node)

    return out

def build_sample_node_sets(
    dom1: pd.DataFrame,
    dom2: pd.DataFrame,
    sec1: pd.DataFrame,
    sec2: pd.DataFrame,
    cross_marker_support: pd.DataFrame,
) -> Dict[str, Dict[str, Set[str]]]:
    """
    更严格一致版：
    节点集 = dominant taxa + supported secondary taxa + cross-secondary supported taxa（若表内可恢复）
    """
    out: Dict[str, Dict[str, Set[str]]] = {}

    def ensure_sample(sid: str) -> None:
        if sid not in out:
            out[sid] = {
                "dominant_nodes": set(),
                "secondary_nodes": set(),
                "cross_supported_nodes": set(),
                "all_nodes": set(),
            }

    for df in [dom1, dom2]:
        for _, r in df.iterrows():
            sid = r["sample_id"]
            node = r["harmonized_taxon_name"]
            if sid and node:
                ensure_sample(sid)
                out[sid]["dominant_nodes"].add(node)
                out[sid]["all_nodes"].add(node)

    for df in [sec1, sec2]:
        for _, r in df.iterrows():
            sid = r["sample_id"]
            node = r["harmonized_taxon_name"]
            support = clean_text(r.get("support_status", "")).lower()
            is_supported = ("support" in support and "insufficient" not in support and "unsupported" not in support)
            if sid and node and is_supported:
                ensure_sample(sid)
                out[sid]["secondary_nodes"].add(node)
                out[sid]["all_nodes"].add(node)

    cross_nodes = extract_cross_supported_taxa(cross_marker_support)
    for sid, nodes in cross_nodes.items():
        ensure_sample(sid)
        out[sid]["cross_supported_nodes"].update(nodes)
        out[sid]["all_nodes"].update(nodes)

    return out

def build_sample_addons(
    sample_type_call: pd.DataFrame,
    cross_marker_support: pd.DataFrame,
    sample_nodes: Dict[str, Dict[str, Set[str]]],
    reproducible_edges: pd.DataFrame,
    marker_specific_edges: pd.DataFrame,
) -> Tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:
    sample_col = require_col(sample_type_call, ["sample_id"], "sample_type_call.sample_id")
    cross_col = require_col(cross_marker_support, ["sample_id"], "cross_marker_support_summary.sample_id")

    sample_ids = sorted(set(sample_type_call[sample_col].astype(str).tolist()))
    error_rows = []

    repro_use = reproducible_edges[reproducible_edges["reproducible_edge_loose"] == True].copy()
    marker_specific_use = marker_specific_edges[marker_specific_edges["burden_use_flag"] == True].copy()

    sample_rows = []
    for sid in sample_ids:
        node_info = sample_nodes.get(
            sid,
            {
                "dominant_nodes": set(),
                "secondary_nodes": set(),
                "cross_supported_nodes": set(),
                "all_nodes": set(),
            }
        )

        dominant_nodes = set(node_info["dominant_nodes"])
        all_nodes = set(node_info["all_nodes"])

        repro_in_sample = []
        repro_taxa = set()
        repro_scores = []

        for _, r in repro_use.iterrows():
            a, b = r["edge_key"].split("||", 1)
            if a in all_nodes and b in all_nodes:
                repro_in_sample.append(r["edge_key"])
                repro_taxa.update([a, b])
                v = pd.to_numeric(pd.Series([r["loose_edge_stability_score"]]), errors="coerce").iloc[0]
                if pd.notna(v):
                    repro_scores.append(float(v))

        induced_edges = 0
        marker_specific_edge_n = 0
        dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n = 0

        for _, r in marker_specific_use.iterrows():
            a, b = r["node1"], r["node2"]
            if a in all_nodes and b in all_nodes:
                induced_edges += 1
                marker_specific_edge_n += 1
                if (a in dominant_nodes) or (b in dominant_nodes):
                    dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n += 1

        burden = (marker_specific_edge_n / induced_edges) if induced_edges > 0 else pd.NA
        sample_edge_stability = min(repro_scores) if len(repro_scores) > 0 else pd.NA

        sample_rows.append({
            "sample_id": sid,
            "network_core_support_any": bool(len(repro_in_sample) > 0),
            "network_core_support_n": int(len(repro_in_sample)),
            "network_core_support_taxa": "|".join(sorted(repro_taxa)),
            "network_repro_support_class": "reproducible_support" if len(repro_in_sample) > 0 else "no_reproducible_support",
            "dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n": int(dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n),
            "induced_subgraph_edge_n": int(induced_edges),
            "network_marker_specific_burden": burden,
            "edge_stability_score": sample_edge_stability,
            "stability_threshold_used": 0.70,
            "dom_conflict_marker_specific_flag": bool(dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n > 0),
            "network_discordance_note": "edge-level structural evidence only; non-causal",
        })

        if len(all_nodes) == 0:
            error_rows.append({
                "sample_id": sid,
                "error_code": "STEP5A_SAMPLE_NO_NODE_SET",
                "note": "no dominant/secondary/cross-supported harmonized nodes available for sample-level induced subgraph",
            })

    sample_addon = pd.DataFrame(sample_rows)

    cross_addon = cross_marker_support.rename(columns={cross_col: "sample_id"}).copy()
    cross_addon = cross_addon.merge(
        sample_addon[[
            "sample_id",
            "network_repro_support_class",
            "network_marker_specific_burden",
            "dom_conflict_marker_specific_flag"
        ]],
        on="sample_id",
        how="left"
    )

    error_df = pd.DataFrame(error_rows, columns=["sample_id", "error_code", "note"])
    return sample_addon, cross_addon, error_df

def build_topology_stability_summary(edge_stability_summary: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if edge_stability_summary.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[
            "marker", "method", "threshold_level",
            "main_edge_n", "mean_edge_stability", "median_edge_stability",
            "edge_n_ge_0_70"
        ])

    rows = []
    for keys, g in edge_stability_summary.groupby(["marker", "method", "threshold_level"], dropna=False):
        marker, method, level = keys
        main_edge_n = int((g["main_present"] == True).sum())
        vals = pd.to_numeric(g["edge_stability_score"], errors="coerce").dropna()

        rows.append({
            "marker": marker,
            "method": method,
            "threshold_level": level,
            "main_edge_n": main_edge_n,
            "mean_edge_stability": float(vals.mean()) if not vals.empty else pd.NA,
            "median_edge_stability": float(vals.median()) if not vals.empty else pd.NA,
            "edge_n_ge_0_70": int((vals >= 0.70).sum()) if not vals.empty else 0,
        })

    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

def build_dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment(sample_addon: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if sample_addon.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[
            "sample_id",
            "dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n",
            "induced_subgraph_edge_n",
            "dom_marker_specific_enrichment_ratio"
        ])

    x = sample_addon.copy()
    x["dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n"] = pd.to_numeric(x["dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n"], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
    x["induced_subgraph_edge_n"] = pd.to_numeric(x["induced_subgraph_edge_n"], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
    x["dom_marker_specific_enrichment_ratio"] = x.apply(
        lambda r: (r["dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n"] / r["induced_subgraph_edge_n"])
        if r["induced_subgraph_edge_n"] > 0 else pd.NA,
        axis=1
    )

    return x[[
        "sample_id",
        "dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n",
        "induced_subgraph_edge_n",
        "dom_marker_specific_enrichment_ratio"
    ]].copy()

def main() -> None:
    args = parse_args()
    result_dir = normalize_path_for_runtime(args.result_dir)

    info(f"result_dir = {result_dir}")
    check_inputs(result_dir)

    its1_sp = standardize_edge_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "ITS1_spieceasi_edges.tsv", "ITS1_spieceasi_edges.tsv"), "ITS1", "SPIEC_EASI")
    its2_sp = standardize_edge_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "ITS2_spieceasi_edges.tsv", "ITS2_spieceasi_edges.tsv"), "ITS2", "SPIEC_EASI")
    its1_fw = standardize_edge_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "ITS1_flashweave_edges.tsv", "ITS1_flashweave_edges.tsv"), "ITS1", "FLASHWEAVE")
    its2_fw = standardize_edge_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "ITS2_flashweave_edges.tsv", "ITS2_flashweave_edges.tsv"), "ITS2", "FLASHWEAVE")

    sp_all = pd.concat([its1_sp, its2_sp], ignore_index=True)
    fw_all = pd.concat([its1_fw, its2_fw], ignore_index=True)

    common_taxa_df = load_tsv(result_dir / "moduleA_prep" / "network_taxa_intersection.tsv", "network_taxa_intersection.tsv")
    common_taxa_sets = load_common_taxa_sets(common_taxa_df)

    dom1 = standardize_lineage_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS1.tsv", "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS1.tsv"), "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS1.tsv")
    dom2 = standardize_lineage_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS2.tsv", "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS2.tsv"), "sample_dominant_lineage_ITS2.tsv")
    sec1 = standardize_lineage_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS1.tsv", "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS1.tsv"), "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS1.tsv")
    sec2 = standardize_lineage_table(load_tsv(result_dir / "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS2.tsv", "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS2.tsv"), "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS2.tsv")

    sample_type_call = load_tsv(result_dir / "sample_type_call.tsv", "sample_type_call.tsv")
    cross_marker_support = load_tsv(result_dir / "cross_marker_support_summary.tsv", "cross_marker_support_summary.tsv")

    sp_stats = summarize_edge_stats(sp_all)
    fw_stats = summarize_edge_stats(fw_all)

    frames = [df for df in [sp_stats, fw_stats] if not df.empty]
    if frames:
        edge_stability_summary = pd.concat(frames, ignore_index=True)
    else:
        edge_stability_summary = pd.DataFrame(columns=[
            "marker", "method", "threshold_level", "edge_key", "node1", "node2",
            "main_present", "main_sign", "main_weight",
            "bootstrap_n", "bootstrap_support_n", "edge_stability_score"
        ])

    loose_edges = evaluate_loose_edges(sp_stats)
    strict_edges = evaluate_strict_edges(sp_stats, fw_stats, common_taxa_sets)
    reproducible_edges = build_reproducible_edges(loose_edges, strict_edges)
    marker_specific_edges = build_marker_specific_edges(sp_stats)

    core_modules = detect_core_modules(reproducible_edges)
    centrality = compute_node_centrality(sp_stats)

    sample_nodes = build_sample_node_sets(dom1, dom2, sec1, sec2, cross_marker_support)
    sample_addon, cross_addon, sample_error_df = build_sample_addons(
        sample_type_call,
        cross_marker_support,
        sample_nodes,
        reproducible_edges,
        marker_specific_edges,
    )

    topology_stability_summary = build_topology_stability_summary(edge_stability_summary)
    dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment = build_dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment(sample_addon)

    metric_defs = pd.DataFrame([
        {
            "metric_name": "edge_stability_score",
            "definition": "bootstrap recurrence proportion among resample_id > 0",
            "default_value": 0.70,
            "note": "strict and loose use threshold >= 0.70"
        },
        {
            "metric_name": "reproducible_edge_loose",
            "definition": "ITS1/ITS2 SPIEC-EASI loose main edge + sign agree + min stability >= 0.70",
            "default_value": "TRUE/FALSE",
            "note": "cross-marker loose reproducibility"
        },
        {
            "metric_name": "reproducible_edge_strict",
            "definition": "default + strict both pass; SPIEC-EASI + FlashWeave sign agree + common taxa node constraint + min stability >= 0.70",
            "default_value": "TRUE/FALSE",
            "note": "strict edge rule"
        },
        {
            "metric_name": "network_marker_specific_burden",
            "definition": "marker_specific_edge_n / induced_subgraph_edge_n",
            "default_value": "NA when denominator=0",
            "note": "sample-level burden; current burden uses default threshold marker-specific edges"
        },
    ])

    write_tsv(reproducible_edges, result_dir / "reproducible_edges.tsv")
    write_tsv(marker_specific_edges, result_dir / "marker_specific_edges.tsv")
    write_tsv(core_modules, result_dir / "reproducible_core_modules.tsv")
    write_tsv(centrality, result_dir / "node_centrality_comparison.tsv")
    write_tsv(edge_stability_summary, result_dir / "edge_stability_summary.tsv")
    write_tsv(topology_stability_summary, result_dir / "topology_stability_summary.tsv")
    write_tsv(dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment, result_dir / "dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment.tsv")
    write_tsv(metric_defs, result_dir / "network_metric_definitions.tsv")
    write_tsv(sample_addon, result_dir / "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv")
    write_tsv(cross_addon, result_dir / "cross_marker_support_network_addon.tsv")
    write_tsv(sample_error_df, result_dir / "sample_level_error_log.tsv")

    info("已写出模块 A 最终结果。")
    info(f"reproducible_edges.tsv rows = {reproducible_edges.shape[0]}")
    info(f"marker_specific_edges.tsv rows = {marker_specific_edges.shape[0]}")
    info(f"sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv rows = {sample_addon.shape[0]}")
    info(f"topology_stability_summary.tsv rows = {topology_stability_summary.shape[0]}")
    info(f"dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment.tsv rows = {dom_conflict_marker_specific_enrichment.shape[0]}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

只有 6 个样本能算出 burden

只有 3 个样本出现 dominant taxon 相关的 marker-specific 冲突信号。


所以模块 A 当前提供的是少数样本上的稀疏附加证据，不是广泛、稳定、可推广的结构解释层。


第四，SPIEC-EASI 与 FlashWeave 的信息不对称。
四张主边表里：


ITS1_spieceasi_edges.tsv 只有 1 条边，而且只在 loose

ITS2_spieceasi_edges.tsv 有 4 条，但分散在 loose/default/strict

ITS1_flashweave_edges.tsv 有 9 条

ITS2_flashweave_edges.tsv 有 6 条


说明 FlashWeave 能找到更多边，但 SPIEC-EASI 在双 marker 上的主运行支持非常稀疏，导致 strict / reproducible 条件过不去。
所以现在不是“模块 A 没产出”，而是“产出了，但产出显示当前数据并不支持强网络结论”。


这意味着什么


如果你的研究目标是：


证明存在稳定、跨 marker、一致的网络关系
那现在这版模块 A 的结果，解释力不够。


如果你的研究目标是：


检验是否存在 robust 网络证据，并诚实报告网络信号弱或只在少数样本/单 marker 上出现
那现在这版模块 A 已经有价值，因为它清楚地告诉你：


没有可复现核心边

没有 strict 边

只有一条 ITS2 特异边

只有少数样本出现 marker-specific burden / dominant-conflict 信号。


我给你的最终判断


模块 A 现在更像是“排除了强网络解释”的证据，而不是“建立了强网络解释”的证据。


这本身不是坏结果，也不是失败。
它说明：在你当前数据、当前阈值、当前节点集定义下，网络层新增分析没有显著提升对大多数样本的解释力度。


下一步最值得做的是：判断你要不要把这个结果当作“阴性但有价值的网络结论”保留，还是继续调整阈值/输入定义来提高模块 A 的信号强度。
